metadata.title: About the world-models site
metadata.description: What this site tracks and how the editorial workflow works.

title: About this site
description: This project tracks world-model papers, systems, and weekly developments with a bilingual editorial workflow.

sections.scope_body: The site focuses on world models, adjacent predictive systems, embodied and robotics world models, driving simulators, and other major systems that materially shape the category.
sections.workflow_body: Version 1 is file-based and editor-curated. New candidates are gathered from papers, official blogs, GitHub repositories, and major release channels, then reviewed before publication.
sections.editorial_body: The goal is not to mirror every feed. The goal is to surface the highest-signal items that help practitioners, operators, and curious readers understand the field.
